title: Experiment: Operational audit packs for SMB service businesses
thesis: Launch one niche-specific landing page, outbound-compatible intake flow, and paid diagnostic offer capped at low acquisition spend.
successMetrics: Positive contribution margin within budget envelope
launchChecklist: Define asset package and offer page
Confirm treasury category and spend tags
Create kill and compound review dates
measurementPlan: Capture spend, attributable revenue, and response rate daily
Review conversion and payback time every 24 hours during launch week
Update portfolio score after each milestone or anomaly
killThreshold: Kill if no meaningful traction signal appears before 60% of budget cap is consumed.
compoundThreshold: Compound if initial payback is visible and distribution can be expanded without sharply raising CAC.

nextActions.title: Define the first bounded offer for Operational audit packs for SMB service businesses
nextActions.notes: Lock the smallest revenue-bearing offer, budget cap, and kill criteria.

nextActions.title: Build launch assets for Operational audit packs for SMB service businesses
nextActions.notes: Ship a landing page, support docs, and measurement hooks.

nextActions.title: Remove the first distribution bottleneck for Operational audit packs for SMB service businesses
nextActions.notes: Set the initial channel mix and evidence capture for first traffic.
